mnemonics: Father Charles Goes Down And Puts His Hand Over The Key
keyPoints: Directory Structure: A hierarchical organization of files and directories
Protection: File permissions and access control lists
File System Implementation: File allocation tables, inodes, and file systems
File System Structure: A tree-like structure of directories and files
File System Operations: File creation, deletion, and modification
File System Internals: File allocation, deallocation, and file metadata
